events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Form build & bracing, industrial site, Concrete & Masonry. Observed field condition: forms not oiled. Work rough-complete. Reference ACI 347. Treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Need decision pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since forms not oiled is non-compliant? ACI 347 addresses formwork for concrete; form release agents/oiling required to prevent concrete adhesion, ensure finish, prevent damage. Not oiled is a defect but maybe not dangerous. However instructions: If work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Is forms not oiled non-compliant? It is non-compliant with specs/ACI 347. So decision fail. Risk maybe medium? Could cause concrete sticking, surface defects, form damage, rework. Not immediate safety hazard but quality/non-compliance. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: 70 until defects corrected. Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings: forms not oiled, no release agent applied. Actions: apply approved form release agent per manufacturer and spec before concrete placement; inspect all form surfaces. Rationale: ACI 347 requires forms be treated with release agent to prevent bond and ensure quality; absence is defect requiring correction before next stage. References: ACI 347. Need ensure JSON valid.

  "rationale": "ACI 347 requires formwork to be treated with a suitable release agent to prevent concrete adhesion, protect form surfaces, and achieve the specified concrete finish. The absence of oil/release treatment on the roughed-in forms is a non-compliant defect that must be corrected before the work can proceed to closeout or concrete placement.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
}
